name: Brian Valencia
title: Full-Stack Software Engineer

about.body: I'm a software engineer based in the Philippines who started in systems and infrastructure, wandered into full-stack product work, and lately has been deeply interested in the AI side of things: building RAG pipelines, wiring up MCPs, figuring out how to make intelligent systems actually useful rather than just impressive. I like working on teams where there's still room to shape how things are built, not just where they're built. My favorite kind of software is the kind nobody complains about.
statements: Somewhere between "make it work" and "make it right" is where I live
I do my best to prevent the cloud from being your cost center
Untyped code gives me a rash

bio: Full-stack Software Engineer with DevOps experience, focused on modern full-stack development and building production-ready applications with real business impact.
